---
title: "Optimization & Numerical Methods"
description: "Convex optimization, LP, dynamic programming, gradient methods, fixed-point theorems."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
60 TUTORIALS
:::

# Optimization & Numerical Methods

Convex optimization, LP, dynamic programming, gradient methods, fixed-point theorems.
